experience.title: Program Manager
responsibilities: Developed and implemented educational programs focused on STEM subjects for K-12 students.
Collaborated with educators and administrators to enhance learning outcomes.
Managed project timelines and budgets for multiple concurrent programs.
Analyzed student performance data to drive program improvements and adjustments.

experience.title: Education Coordinator
responsibilities: Assisted in designing curriculum and educational materials for after-school programs.
Engaged stakeholders including parents and community leaders to support educational initiatives.
Conducted program evaluations to measure effectiveness and gather feedback.

response.summary: Experienced education program manager with a focus on developing and managing educational initiatives. Adept at collaborating with educators and analyzing data to enhance program effectiveness.
